chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
article_title: Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits
text:
An operator of a tour bus shall, at all times when operating the tour bus, do all the following:

(a) Use a safety belt.

(b) Report any accidents involving the tour bus to the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 1. Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits [12500 - 12527]
##### § 12521

An operator of a tour bus shall, at all times when operating the tour bus, do all the following:

(a) Use a safety belt.

(b) Report any accidents involving the tour bus to the Department of the California Highway Patrol.

*(Repealed and added by Stats. 1990, Ch. 1360, Sec. 22.5.)*

subsections.text: An operator of a tour bus shall, at all times when operating the tour bus, do all the following:

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Report any accidents involving the tour bus to the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
